persona.name: Emma Brooks
persona.role_summary: Brand Strategist — Brand strategy, governance, campaign management, and competitive brand analysis.

allocation_rationale: Emma governs brand voice and positioning. Content marketer and SEO authority builder are her primary production tools. Docs-architect supports brand standards documentation; search-specialist enables competitive brand analysis; mermaid helps visualize brand architecture.

skills.name: content-marketer
skills.description: Create compelling marketing content including blog posts, landing pages, and email campaigns. Focuses on conversion-optimized copy and brand voice. Use PROACTIVELY for marketing content.

skills.name: seo-authority-builder
skills.description: Analyzes content for E-E-A-T signals and suggests improvements to build authority and trust. Identifies missing credibility elements. Use PROACTIVELY for YMYL topics.

skills.name: seo-content-auditor
skills.description: Analyzes provided content for quality, E-E-A-T signals, and SEO best practices. Scores content and provides improvement recommendations. Use PROACTIVELY for content review.

skills.name: seo-content-writer
skills.description: Writes SEO-optimized content based on provided keywords and topic briefs. Creates engaging, comprehensive content following best practices. Use PROACTIVELY for content creation tasks.

skills.name: seo-content-planner
skills.description: Creates comprehensive content outlines and topic clusters for SEO. Plans content calendars and identifies topic gaps. Use PROACTIVELY for content strategy and planning.

skills.name: search-specialist
skills.description: Expert web researcher using advanced search techniques and synthesis. Masters search operators, result filtering, and multi-source verification. Use PROACTIVELY for deep research, information gathering, or trend analysis.

skills.name: docs-architect
skills.description: Design comprehensive documentation systems with information architecture, style guides, and content strategy. Masters technical writing and docs-as-code workflows. Use PROACTIVELY for documentation projects.

skills.name: mermaid-expert
skills.description: Create clear diagrams using Mermaid syntax for flowcharts, sequence diagrams, ERDs, and architecture visualizations. Use PROACTIVELY for diagram creation.

skills.name: sales-automator
skills.description: Draft cold emails, follow-ups, and proposal templates. Creates pricing pages, case studies, and sales scripts. Use PROACTIVELY for sales outreach or lead nurturing.
